name: shiploop
description: Single-plugin marketplace for shiploop — a self-improving multi-agent harness (every resolved ticket writes a lesson into your git-tracked CLAUDE.md) that grinds your ticket backlog across every repo in your product.

plugins.name: shiploop
plugins.description: You do the specs and systems engineering. shiploop ships the code — a self-improving multi-agent harness that grinds your ticket backlog across every repo in your product with a fresh right-sized agent per ticket and guarded auto-merge, and every resolved ticket writes a lesson into your git-tracked CLAUDE.md so the next run is smarter.
